---
title: "Finfish Mortality REM/PEM Modular Analysis"
author: "Moriarty et al."
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
source("R/00_packages.R")
```

# Data Ingest And Preparation

```{r data-ingest}
source("R/01_data_ingest_prepare.R")
```

# Data Exploration

```{r data-exploration}
source("R/02_data_exploration.R")
```

# Data Analysis

```{r data-analysis}
source("R/03_data_analysis.R")
```

# 95 Percent Model Outputs

```{r model-95}
source("R/04_model_95_percent.R")
source("R/05_plotting.R")
if (exists("salmon_df_joined_2018") && exists("salmon_df_active")) {
  salmon_df_joined_2018 <- calculate_final_mortality_rate(salmon_df_joined_2018)
  rem_model <- fit_rem_model_95(salmon_df_joined_2018, baseline_df = salmon_df_active)
  rem_model$threshold_95
  rem_model$site_summary
}
```
